stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What is the correct statement for the aircraft of the annex?

options.a: The longitudinal arms for the 11-seat layout are the same as for the 12-seat layout.
options.b: The longitudinal CGs of the stretchers are more aft than the longitudinal CGs of the middle row of passenger seats of the 11-seat layout.
options.c: The middle seats of the 12-seat layout have the same longitudinal arm as the medical attendant's seat.
options.d: The upper and lower stretchers have the same longitudinal arm.
